questionHtml: Sketch the graph of y=f1(x), stating the values of any axes intercepts and the coordinates of any local maximum or minimum points.
markschemeHtml:
inverted parabola extended below the x-axis             A1

x-axis intercept values x=0, 2         A1


Note: Accept a graph passing through the origin as an indication of x=0.

local maximum at 1, 1                 A1


Note: Coordinates must be stated to gain the final A1.
        Do not accept decimal approximations.


[3 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graph of y=f1(x), stating the values of any axes intercepts and the coordinates of any local maximum or minimum points.
